form.formComment: Last start was driven from back in the field when 7th (Fr4) over 1635m at Temora beaten 24 m by Harjaybro (2:00.80) in 0-1 WIN on April 6 at $151. Two runs back 8th (Fr2) over 1760m at Junee, beaten 35 m by One Stunin Melody (2:14.10) in 0-1 WIN on March 31 at $71. Draws well but hard to have on those efforts.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Inconvenienced behind My Ultimate Bruno when that runner was giving ground.
Tired over the concluding stages to be beaten in excess of 59m.
Out of position at the start.

form.formComment: Three-year-old filly facing the starter for the second time. At debut broke in score up and was out of position at the start 6th (Sr2) over 1760m at Junee beaten 65 m by William Aitch (2:12.10) in 3yo MAIDEN on March 31 at $26. Draws well so may improve.

form.formComment: Last start 5th (Fr6) over 1720m at Young beaten 18 m by Happy Tulhurst (2:06.50) in MAIDEN on April 10 at $14. At his previous start was well back in the run when 4th (Fr6) over 1740m at Riverina Paceway beaten 15 m by Elle Are Em (2:07.30) in MAIDEN on April 4 at $7.50. Maybe a place.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Hung outwards passing the 300m inconveniencing Trugold.
Broke during the early stages of the score up.

form.formComment: Last start 4th (Sr4) over 1635m at Temora, at the bell was 7th-11.7 beaten 12 m by Harjaybro (2:00.80) in 0-1 WIN on April 6 at $5.50. At his previous start 6th (Sr2) over 1760m at Junee was 9th-18.2 at the bell, beaten 11 m by Official View (2:12.20) in 0-1 WIN on March 31 at $41. Contender.

formComments.title: TAB

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Inconvenienced approaching the 300m when My Guarantee was giving ground.
Broke gait passing the 300m checking Sophies Scooter.

form.formComment: Last start was well beaten into eighth after being driven well back, behind Yottie at Bathurst over 1730m in a 3yo No NR CG on March 23 at $101. Raced better the start before that where he posted a big 9 m win as favourite after showing early speed, (Fr3) at Bankstown (2:12.70) beating Pleasant Heights in 3yo MAIDEN on March 16 at $2 at the bell was leading 4.3. Well placed with a big class drop.

form.formComment: Returns after seven months in the paddock. Finished off last preparation when well beaten into ninth behind Atworthy Rocker at this track over 1758m in a 0-1 WIN on September 16 at $2.80. Keep safe fresh.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Returns after seven months in the paddock. Finished off last preparation when well beaten into ninth behind Atworthy Rocker at this track over 1758m in a 0-1 WIN on September 16 at $2.80. Keep safe fresh.

form.formComment: Last start 5th (Fr3) over 1635m after showing early pace at Temora beaten 22 m by One More Reason (1:58.70) in 3yo NMT1W/TS on April 6 at $26. Two runs back 3rd (Sr1) over 1760m at Junee beaten 2 m by Bettes Blue Violet (2:12.60) in NR up to 50 M on March 17 at $126. Place best.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start 5th (Fr3) over 1635m after showing early pace at Temora beaten 22 m by One More Reason (1:58.70) in 3yo NMT1W/TS on April 6 at $26. Two runs back 3rd (Sr1) over 1760m at Junee beaten 2 m by Bettes Blue Violet (2:12.60) in NR up to 50 M on March 17 at $126. Place best.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Yielded ground from approx 500m.
Utilised the sprint lane in the home straight.
Over raced at various stages of the race.

form.formComment: Failed to impress last start; 8th (Fr3) over 2270m at Riverina Paceway, beaten 90 m by My Ultimate Franco (2:42.50) in NR up to 48 on March 20 at $71. Showed ability the run before when he won by 4.5 m as favourite when quickly away, (Fr2) overraced, at this track (2:43.40) beating The Kid Billy in 1 WIN on March 10 at $2.70 at the bell was leading 2.1. Improvement needed.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Tired over the concluding stages of the event.
Over-raced during the early stages of the event.
Raced roughly after the start was effected.
Held up for clear running until near the 100m.
Raced ungenerously entering and rounding the first turn.
Raced roughly after the start.

form.formComment: Won three starts back at this track over 1758m MAIDEN on January 1. Last time out 4th (Sr2) over 2147m at this track was 4th-11.2 at the bell, beaten 13 m by Swedish Meatballs (2:38.70) in NR up to 52 on March 10 at $31. Another good showing expected.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Inconvenienced approaching the 1700m when Official View broke gait.

form.formComment: Didn't do much last time out, 8th (Sr2) over 1760m at Junee beaten 40 m by Magic Matteo (2:10.80) in NR 41 to 46 on March 17 at $126. Before that was well beaten after breaking at this track on March 10. Not racing well enough.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Inconvenienced behind the tiring Social Status leaving the 400m.
Tired over the concluding stages and beaten by a considerable margin.
Began badly as the start was effected.
Inconvenienced approaching the 400m when held up behind the tiring Just Go Joe.
Hung out under pressure.
